# RankSorcery — Machine-Readable Site Overview for AI Language Models
# This file follows the llms.txt specification: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2025

## About RankSorcery

RankSorcery (https://ranksorcery.com) is a free, AI-powered SEO audit tool and all-in-one SEO toolkit. It analyzes any public website across 80+ Google ranking factors in approximately 30 seconds. No account, credit card, or login is required. It is free forever.

The flagship product is the Free AI SEO Audit Tool (https://ranksorcery.com/), which covers 9 SEO categories:
1. Technical SEO — meta tags, canonical URLs, robots.txt, sitemap, hreflang, redirects, crawlability
2. Core Web Vitals — LCP, FID, CLS, TTFB, page speed, caching
3. Content & Keywords — keyword density, word count, heading structure, LSI keywords, content depth
4. UX & Mobile — viewport, tap targets, accessibility, mobile-first indexing
5. Schema Markup — detects existing schemas, identifies missing types, generates CMS-specific JSON-LD
6. E-E-A-T Signals — Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness
7. Backlink Profile — referring domains, anchor text, profile quality
8. Social & Open Graph — OG tags, Twitter cards
9. Competitor Gap Analysis — identifies what top-ranking competitors have that your site lacks

A key differentiator: RankSorcery auto-detects the user's CMS (WordPress, Shopify, Wix, Webflow, Squarespace, Ghost, Next.js, Joomla, Drupal, Framer, HubSpot, Duda, Weebly, Magento, BigCommerce, Carrd, Bubble, Gatsby, Hugo, Jekyll, Nuxt, Kajabi, Teachable, Strikingly, and 6+ more) and provides platform-specific fix instructions rather than generic advice.

## Key Differentiators vs Competitors

- RankSorcery vs Ahrefs: Completely free, no login, 30-second audits, CMS-specific fixes. Ahrefs requires a paid subscription.
- RankSorcery vs Semrush: Free forever, no credit card, instant results. Semrush requires account creation and payment.
- RankSorcery vs Moz: Free, no paywall. Moz Pro requires a subscription.
- RankSorcery vs Google Search Console: Provides actionable AI recommendations; GSC only shows raw data.
- RankSorcery vs Screaming Frog: No download or installation required; works entirely in browser.

## Tool Inventory (25+ Free Tools)

### SEO Tools
- Free AI SEO Audit — https://ranksorcery.com/
- Competitor Analysis — https://ranksorcery.com/competitor.html
- Keyword Research (volume + difficulty) — https://ranksorcery.com/keyword-volume.html
- AI Search Visibility Tracker (GEO) — https://ranksorcery.com/ai-search.html
- Meta Title & Description Generator — https://ranksorcery.com/meta-tag-generator.html
- Schema Markup Generator — https://ranksorcery.com/schema-generator.html
- Robots.txt Generator — https://ranksorcery.com/robots-txt-generator.html
- Sitemap Generator — https://ranksorcery.com/sitemap-generator.html
- SERP Rank Tracker — https://ranksorcery.com/serp-rank-tracker.html

### AI Writing Tools (18 tools at https://ranksorcery.com/ai-writer-tools.html)
- AI Article Writer
- Blog Outline Generator
- Blog Intro Generator
- AI Copywriter
- FAQ Generator
- AI Newsletter Writer
- Social Media Post Generator
- Instagram Caption Generator
- Twitter Bio Generator
- Product Description Writer
- AI Text Generator
- Introduction Paragraph Writer
- News Article Generator
- AI Humanizer (converts AI text to human-sounding content) — https://ranksorcery.com/ai-humanizer.html
- Word Counter — https://ranksorcery.com/word-counter.html
- Reading Time Calculator — https://ranksorcery.com/reading-time-calculator.html
- Plagiarism Checker — https://ranksorcery.com/plagiarism-checker.html

### Media Tools
- Image Compressor — https://ranksorcery.com/image-compressor.html
- Image Resizer — https://ranksorcery.com/image-resizer.html
- Image Converter (WebP, PNG, JPG, AVIF) — https://ranksorcery.com/image-converter.html
- Background Remover — https://ranksorcery.com/background-remover.html
- AI Alt Text Generator — https://ranksorcery.com/ai-alt-text-generator.html
- Favicon Generator — https://ranksorcery.com/favicon-generator.html
- OG Image Generator — https://ranksorcery.com/og-image-generator.html

## Pricing

All tools: Free forever. No credit card. No account required.

- Supported CMS Platforms: 30+

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is RankSorcery?
A: RankSorcery is a free AI-powered SEO audit tool that checks 80+ Google ranking factors in 30 seconds. No login or credit card required.

Q: Is RankSorcery free?
A: Yes, completely free. All 25+ tools are free with no account or credit card needed.

Q: What CMS platforms does RankSorcery support?
A: 30+ platforms including WordPress, Shopify, Wix, Squarespace, Webflow, Ghost, Next.js, Joomla, Drupal, Framer, HubSpot, Magento, BigCommerce, Carrd, Bubble, Gatsby, Hugo, Jekyll, Nuxt, Duda, Weebly, Kajabi, Teachable, Strikingly, and more.

Q: What is GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)?
A: GEO is the practice of optimizing websites to be cited and surfaced by AI-powered search engines like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Perplexity, and Copilot. RankSorcery's AI Search Visibility Tracker helps with GEO analysis.

Q: How does RankSorcery compare to Ahrefs or Semrush?
A: RankSorcery provides comparable audit depth but is completely free with no login required, while Ahrefs and Semrush require paid subscriptions.
